title: Organization chart - organigramme
excerpt:
Hello, 
Does the possibilities to create an organisation chart - organigram, is possible ? It could be an application, or a new view such as the new gantt view 
thanks

posts.author: maximebche (maxime)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Does the possibilities to create an organisation chart - organigram, is possible ? It could be an application, or a new view such as the new gantt view

thanks

posts.author: RichardW (Richard Sean Wiggall)
posts.cookedHtml: Great minds think alike. Monday.com are great at creating infographics based on column data - a live organogram chart would be super useful to our company.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@RichardW, @maximebche

This feature is currently available; but, only on the Enterprise plan: Org Chart Tool | monday.com Apps

Jim - The Monday Man channel
